## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new employees and provide an overview of company operations at growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/zRUzunPwsELyzHF1xM_rnCaqdMvzRQCr?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Diverse team of 5 new hires joining across content, engineering, and management roles](https://fathom.video/share/zRUzunPwsELyzHF1xM_rnCaqdMvzRQCr?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Company uses unlimited PTO policy, emphasizing freedom with responsibility](https://fathom.video/share/zRUzunPwsELyzHF1xM_rnCaqdMvzRQCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [Key tools: Notion, Slack, 1Password, Airtable, AirOps, Linear (new project management tool)](https://fathom.video/share/zRUzunPwsELyzHF1xM_rnCaqdMvzRQCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Daily updates via GeekBot in Slack for transparent, asynchronous communication](https://fathom.video/share/zRUzunPwsELyzHF1xM_rnCaqdMvzRQCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [Bridget: Operations lead (Vancouver), 2.5 months at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/zRUzunPwsELyzHF1xM_rnCaqdMvzRQCr?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Sucheta: Content manager/SEO (Bangalore), 15 years experience](https://fathom.video/share/zRUzunPwsELyzHF1xM_rnCaqdMvzRQCr?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Carrie: Managing editor (Charlotte area), agency background](https://fathom.video/share/zRUzunPwsELyzHF1xM_rnCaqdMvzRQCr?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Branko: Managing director (Slovakia), ex-SEMrush, bringing ChosenData.com](https://fathom.video/share/zRUzunPwsELyzHF1xM_rnCaqdMvzRQCr?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Clint: Engineer (Missouri), ex-HashiCorp (6th employee)](https://fathom.video/share/zRUzunPwsELyzHF1xM_rnCaqdMvzRQCr?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)

### Company Policies and Tools

  - [Unlimited PTO: Put time off on team calendars, notify in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/zRUzunPwsELyzHF1xM_rnCaqdMvzRQCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [Referral program: $10k for engineers, $5k for other roles (after 6 months)](https://fathom.video/share/zRUzunPwsELyzHF1xM_rnCaqdMvzRQCr?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Tools list in handbook; 1Password for shared logins](https://fathom.video/share/zRUzunPwsELyzHF1xM_rnCaqdMvzRQCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Linear: New project management tool, integrates with Slack](https://fathom.video/share/zRUzunPwsELyzHF1xM_rnCaqdMvzRQCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)

### Onboarding Process

  - [Handbook in Notion: "Big Picture" section recommended reading](https://fathom.video/share/zRUzunPwsELyzHF1xM_rnCaqdMvzRQCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Onboarding sessions scheduled throughout the week](https://fathom.video/share/zRUzunPwsELyzHF1xM_rnCaqdMvzRQCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
  - [GeekBot daily updates in Slack for transparent communication](https://fathom.video/share/zRUzunPwsELyzHF1xM_rnCaqdMvzRQCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Read through "Big Picture" documents in Notion handbook](https://fathom.video/share/zRUzunPwsELyzHF1xM_rnCaqdMvzRQCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Set up access to key tools (Notion, Slack, 1Password, Airtable, AirOps, Linear)](https://fathom.video/share/zRUzunPwsELyzHF1xM_rnCaqdMvzRQCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Attend scheduled onboarding sessions (Product overview, Customer use cases, Strategy/vision)](https://fathom.video/share/zRUzunPwsELyzHF1xM_rnCaqdMvzRQCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)
  - [Start using GeekBot for daily updates](https://fathom.video/share/zRUzunPwsELyzHF1xM_rnCaqdMvzRQCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
  - Reach out to Bridget or use \#d-onboarding Slack channel for questions
